Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests.datatype

Class TestDatatypeTranslation

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTranslatorTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.datatype.TestDatatypeTranslation
public class TestDatatypeTranslation extends AbstractTranslatorTests
Class checking special cases of datatypes translation.
